esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-rabbitmqreceiver.otel-default
// Unacknowledged: delivered but not yet acked; buildup indicates consumer issues
| WHERE attributes.state == "unacknowledged"
  AND metrics.rabbitmq.message.current IS NOT NULL
| STATS unack_count = MAX(metrics.rabbitmq.message.current)
  BY resource.attributes.rabbitmq.queue.name,
     resource.attributes.rabbitmq.vhost.name,
     resource.attributes.rabbitmq.node.name
// Alert threshold: adjust 500 to tune for consumer processing expectations
| WHERE unack_count > 500
| SORT unack_count DESC
| LIMIT 20
